const OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES: &[usize] = &[258];
const OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS: &[usize] = &[8];

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Token {}

pub type Bits8 = u8;
pub type Bits16 = u16;

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Input0 {
    pub field0: Bits8,
    pub field1: [Bits16; 128],
}

#[derive(Debug, Clone, PartialEq, Eq)]
pub struct Output {
    pub field0: Bits8,
    pub field1: [Bits16; 128],
}

        offset: 44,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 46,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 48,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 50,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 52,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 54,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 56,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 58,

        padded_size: 2,

    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 60,

        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 62,

        padded_size: 2,
    },

        padded_size: 2,

        padded_size: 2,
    },

        offset: 68,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },

        offset: 70,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 72,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },

        offset: 74,

        padded_size: 2,

        offset: 80,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 82,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 84,

        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 86,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 88,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 90,

        padded_size: 2,

    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {

        offset: 174,

    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 176,

        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 178,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 180,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 182,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 184,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 186,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 188,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 190,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 192,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 194,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 196,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 198,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 200,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 202,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 204,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 206,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 208,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 210,

        padded_size: 2,
    },

    },

    },

        offset: 218,

        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 220,

        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 222,

    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 224,

    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 226,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 228,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 230,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 232,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 234,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 236,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 238,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 240,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 242,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 244,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 246,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 248,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 250,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 252,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 254,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
    xlsynth::aot_entrypoint_metadata::AotElementLayout {
        offset: 256,
        data_size: 2,
        padded_size: 2,
    },
];

fn encode_input_0(_value: &Input0, dst: &mut [u8]) {
    debug_assert_eq!(dst.len(), 258);
    dst.fill(0);
    xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
        dst,
        &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize],
        &((_value).field0).to_ne_bytes(),
    );
    for index_0 in 0..128 {
        xlsynth::aot_runner::write_leaf_element(
            dst,
            &INPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
            &(((_value).field1)[index_0]).to_ne_bytes(),
        );
    }
    debug_assert_eq!(INPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 129);
}

fn decode_output_0(src: &[u8]) -> Output {
    debug_assert_eq!(src.len(), 258);
    let output: Output = Output {
        field0: {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 1];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(src, &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize], &mut dst_bytes);
            let decoded = u8::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        },
        field1: std::array::from_fn(|index_0| {
            let mut dst_bytes = [0u8; 2];
            xlsynth::aot_runner::read_leaf_element(
                src,
                &OUTPUT0_LAYOUT[0usize + 1 + index_0],
                &mut dst_bytes,
            );
            let decoded = u16::from_ne_bytes(dst_bytes);
            decoded
        }),
    };
    debug_assert_eq!(OUTPUT0_LAYOUT.len(), 129);
    output
}

pub fn descriptor() -> xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor<'static> {
    unsafe {
        xlsynth::AotEntrypointDescriptor::from_raw_parts_unchecked(
            ENTRYPOINTS_PROTO,
            __xlsynth_aot_linked_symbol_large_array_tuple as *const () as usize,
            xlsynth::AotEntrypointMetadata {
                symbol: "large_array_tuple".to_string(),
                input_buffer_sizes: INPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                input_buffer_alignments: INPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_sizes: OUTPUT_BUFFER_SIZES.to_vec(),
                output_buffer_alignments: OUTPUT_BUFFER_ALIGNMENTS.to_vec(),
                temp_buffer_size: 0,
                temp_buffer_alignment: 1,
            },
        )
    }
}

pub struct Runner {
    inner: xlsynth::AotRunner<'static>,
}

impl Runner {
    pub fn new() -> Result<Self, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        Ok(Self {
            inner: xlsynth::AotRunner::new(descriptor())?,
        })
    }

    pub fn run_with_events(
        &mut self,
        input: &Input0,
    ) -> Result<xlsynth::AotRunResult<Output>, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run_with_events(|inner| {
            let output = decode_output_0(inner.output(0));
            output
        })
    }

    pub fn run(&mut self, input: &Input0) -> Result<Output, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
        encode_input_0(input, self.inner.input_mut(0));
        self.inner.run()?;
        let output = decode_output_0(self.inner.output(0));
        Ok(output)
    }
}

pub fn new_runner() -> Result<Runner, xlsynth::XlsynthError> {
    Runner::new()
}
